caption: In a bright clinical training room, two women are seated in chairs facing each other. One woman, wearing a black long-sleeved shirt and blue pants, sits on the left, while the other, in a light-colored top and dark pants, sits on the right. Both have their hands folded in their laps. The room contains medical equipment, including white tables and a blue rolling cart. Overlaying the scene is white text listing the "Course Instructor: Cheralyn Hendrix, MD" and "Administrative support: Wendy Hackshaw," along with a note of "Special thanks to University of Maryland School of Medicine Surgical Bootcamp Class of 2023 who agreed to have their learning filmed." A list titled "MD Candidates:" includes names such as Rachel Belcher, Rachel Cermak, and Katherine Coburn. A QR code is also visible on the right. Throughout the sequence, the figures remain stationary, and the on-screen text and QR code remain constant.
